output.dependency: The numeric identifier (e.g., an internal record/primary key) is tied to the bibliographic text field; the text (title/abstract-like label) describes the specific entity referenced by that identifier (same record), so the meaning of the identifier determines which document/title appears in the other column.

The title text can imply the presence of a clinical trial/registry reference; when a trial identifier is present in the registry/reference-like column (non-null, shown as an NCT-style token), it corresponds to the specific study described by the title. Therefore the structured trial reference depends on the title’s study type/content.
